revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''2-1-130

A device used to alter the spatial distribution of the luminous flux from a source and depending essentially on the phenomenon of reflection.

Reference: C.I.E.

{{IALAFooter}}
